prompt: Home hero background for the LYDT personal portfolio: a quiet mystical tree sanctuary interior, ancient hollow tree architecture, circular moon window on the right, stone steps, scholar desk, warm lanterns, vines, moss, book shelves, subtle firefly glow, deep readable shadow area on the left for website copy. No UI, no text, no logo.
style: cinematic high-end website hero illustration, restrained eastern xianxia atmosphere, realistic painterly detail, not game UI
composition: wide desktop hero background, strong visual focus on the right half, calm dark negative space on the left, layered depth for responsive cropping
lighting: moonlight through round paper window, warm lantern accents, soft mist, low contrast edges
palette: deep ink green, dark teal, old wood brown, moss green, moon white, muted gold, tiny firefly cyan glow
materials: ancient bark, dark wood grain, stone, moss, parchment, brass lantern, thin mist
constraints: website background only; keep left 45 percent darker and uncluttered for readable text; no characters; no readable writing; no watermark
negative: browser frame, UI components, cards, buttons, text, logos, cyberpunk neon, purple glow, saturated red, western medieval fantasy, dragons, cluttered MMORPG interface

prompt: Blog and article hero background for LYDT: branch library inside an ancient tree, bookshelves embedded in roots, circular moon window, desk with scrolls and books, small lantern, bamboo shadow, moss and vines, subtle fireflies, dark open area for page title. No UI, no text, no logo.
style: premium portfolio website background, restrained eastern xianxia scholar library, detailed but calm
composition: wide desktop background, library scene weighted to the right, left side reserved as dark readable title area, no foreground obstruction over text area
lighting: cool moonlight, warm lantern glow, soft ambient mist
palette: deep ink green, old wood, warm parchment, muted gold, moon white, small cyan-green firefly highlights
materials: tree bark, aged books, parchment, bamboo, wood shelves, moss
constraints: must be usable behind blog list and blog detail hero; no legible text; no UI mockup; no humans; no watermark
negative: messy collage, readable book titles, random Chinese text, bright red, purple neon, horror mood, cartoon style, flat dashboard

prompt: Projects list hero background for LYDT: tree-hollow engineering workshop, round moon window, wooden workbench, lanterns, hanging blank scroll, subtle technical artifacts expressed as abstract jade compasses and brass instruments, moss, vines, old wood. No UI, no text, no logo.
style: professional technical portfolio background with restrained eastern xianxia workshop mood, cinematic but readable
composition: wide desktop hero, right-side workshop focal scene, left third has dark negative space for title and filters, clean silhouette
lighting: moonlit window plus warm lantern pools, soft mist and tiny fireflies
palette: deep ink green, dark teal, old wood brown, jade green, muted gold, moon white, firefly cyan
materials: ancient wood, bark, brass, jade, parchment, moss, stone
constraints: no readable text on scroll; no brand logos; no fantasy weapons; no UI controls; no characters; no watermark
negative: sci-fi spaceship, cyberpunk neon, excessive gold, red game UI, busy inventory screen, cluttered tool icons, browser chrome

prompt: Project detail hero background for LYDT: a tree-hollow research chamber, circular moon window, wooden desk with an open technical scroll, subtle glowing circular diagram on the tabletop, lantern, book shelves, hanging blank banner, vines and moss. No UI, no text, no logo.
style: serious engineering case-study website background, mystical but professional, restrained eastern woodland scholar aesthetic
composition: wide desktop hero, right side contains desk and moon window scene, left side remains dark and uncluttered for title, diagram glow must not overpower text area
lighting: cool moonlight, controlled warm lantern light, faint golden diagram glow, subtle fog
palette: deep ink green, old wood brown, parchment, muted gold, jade green, moon white, small cyan glow
materials: bark wall, wood desk, parchment scroll, brass lantern, moss, aged paper, ink
constraints: do not draw actual code, formulas, or readable labels; no UI panels; no humans; no watermark
negative: dense infographics, random text, glowing sci-fi lab, neon blue domination, western magic symbols, cyberpunk, cartoon fantasy

prompt: 404 page main background for LYDT: unfinished tree hollow path, huge ancient tree tunnel, broken wooden bridge leading toward a circular moon window, moonlit mountain view outside, right-side lantern and blank wooden sign, moss and vines, poetic calm atmosphere. No UI, no text, no logo.
style: cinematic website error page illustration, restrained eastern xianxia tree sanctuary, calm and helpful, not scary
composition: landscape composition with a large dark readable area on the left for 404 text, bridge and moon window on the right, strong depth and clear path metaphor
lighting: cool moonlight at the window, warm lantern accents, soft mist, small fireflies
palette: deep ink green, dark teal, old wood, moon white, muted gold, moss green, firefly cyan
materials: aged planks, bark, stone, moss, vines, paper lantern, distant mountains
constraints: left 40 percent must be dark and low-detail; sign must be blank or illegible; no readable text; no people; no watermark
negative: horror cave, scary monster, bright red warnings, browser chrome, UI buttons, readable sign text, cartoonish style, over-saturated gold

prompt: Resume page hero background for LYDT: professional moonlit tree study, circular moon window, wooden desk with open blank resume scroll, lantern, tea cup, books, moss, vines, hanging blank scroll, quiet scholar atmosphere. No UI, no text, no logo.

lighting: moonlight through the window, warm lantern on desk, soft mist and tiny fireflies

prompt: Reusable contact and footer background for LYDT: moon window tea room inside an ancient tree, low wooden tea table, teapot, open paper notes, small lantern, mossy roots, circular window showing moonlit mountains, quiet deep green atmosphere. No UI, no text, no logo.

lighting: moonlight from window, soft warm lantern, gentle vignette, faint fireflies
